transcript: Hey, Joe. This is Kathy with ABQ Drug Testing. Uh, what is your last name, Joe?
This is Kathy from ABQ Drug Testing.
Who are you? I don’t understand—what—what—what drugs are you do—you talking about?
You’re supposed to come for a urine test?
You chickenshit criminal! You’re a criminal, you motherfucker!
Hello? Yeah, I’m already on this line. Could you please hang up?
I—I’m already talking on this line, sir. Would you please hang up so I can get back to my conversation?
What does this have to do—why did you call me to begin with?
I didn’t. Your phone keeps calling me, for some reason—
How c—could it call you when I don’t dial it? It’s a cellphone—
—Well, you must have a broken phone or something—
—Who do you talk to? You’re a criminal! You’re a chickenshit criminal!
You keep on calling me! And I have a soldier in my house—my grand—grandson!
—He’ll shred you to pieces, you motherfucker!
—Stop calling me, I said! You criminal! You piece of shit!—
Hi, this is Sam. Uh, I live down the street. How are you?
Uh, Sam Devito is my full name.
Yeah, and—and—and how do you know me?
Oh, I forgot. What street was that? Um, it was just nearby, here. Uh, but anyway—
—Listen, I saw just calling because I was gonna stop by. I got a special deal goin’ on. I cut hair. I was just gonna come by and cut your hair tonight, okay? It’s only $35 for a haircut.
Uh, I’m not—I’m not i—inviting anybody and I’m 94 years of age?
Well, you still need your haircut!—
—I still need the hair but—you’re right! You’re a hundred percent right!
—But I don’t take just haircut just to go to anybody! My granddaughter gives it to my anyway.
You could be the best. I don’t know you and I don’t wanna do it!—
—[sfx] I’m gonna come over at six o’clock and I’ll cut your hair and, uh, clean ya up, okay? And it’s just $85—
—when I say, “No”? You—you say you’re gonna force me—
—t—to come over? I don’t like that.
—Cause now you’re talkin’—now you’re talkin’ like a criminal to me!
You’re gonna look real good! You’re gonna love the way you look!—
—We’re talking about scissors sharper than a donkey’s bite!
—I don’t give a shit! If I say, “No!”—
—Th—this is—this is Tobie. I’m gonna cut your hair. I talked to you earlier.
You sonofabitch! If you not gonna quit I’m calling the FBI right now on you! You sonofabitch criminal!
Don’t do that. Please don’t do that—
—You piece of shit! Shit! Shit! Shit! Get off!
I’m gonna cut your hair like nothin’ you’ve ever seen before.
I don’t know! Who are you?
Who gonna pay? Who gonna pay?
I don’t have money! I need a lot of money to buy food! A lot!
We have the African sweet buns for sale. Real, real sweet—
—You criminal motherfucking chickenshit! Get off my phone! You sonofabitch! You piece of shit! Shit! Shit! Shit!
This is Dion Fairchild, your neighbor. I’ve got Morgan on the phone here—who’s a realtor. He’s gonna help sell your house for ya, okay? Say, “Hello”.
Drop dead, you bastard! Drop dead!—
—You’re gonna let this guy sell your house, you got it?
Hey, it’s Big Red. What do you need from me, here?
I need you to drop dead, motherfuckin’ chickenshit piece of shit! Criminal! Piece of shit! God is gonna punish you! You’re gonna drop dead tonight! You motherfucker piece of shit!—
Oh, hey! This is Alex. How’re you doin’?
‘Cause I was gonna bring Thor and Georgia up to you and, ah, introduce you guys to each other.
Thor and Georgia; they’re a couple.
Why? Why’re you—w—I still don’t understand why!—why you want to introduce me to me. [sic]
Uh, ‘cause maybe you can give them, ah, some money for the wedding present.
What the hell do I have anything to do with it?
Joe, let’s just meet—you, me, and Thor and Georgia—
—Listen, I’ll call the police if you want to! You don’t lay off?! You son of a bitch? Get off, you criminal!
Let’s get together this afternoon, okay?

Yeah? You drop dead! I have my—my soldier here! And he has plenty of guns that he gonna give—gonna be take ya apart, to pieces! I have my grandson—is—lives with me. And he was in the Army for three and a half years. And he will shred you up to pieces! I swear to God! And he will shred you up in one second to pieces! You motherfuckin’ chickenshit! Lay off! Lay off, you fucker! Come over to my house and you will be droppin’ dead in one split second! You sonofabitch! Get a job, motherfucker! You’re ruining this country, motherfuckerr! You piece of shit! Lay off! You’re a shit! Shit! Shit! Shit!
Hi! Ah, yeah, I’ve been talking with Sylvester and he wanted me to jump on the phone with you. Maybe you can help explain a little bit more about, um, his situation and, ah, what he was doin’?
What situation? I don’t know what you’re talkin’ about!
He mentioned you could talk with me about a bicycle trip he was just on.
You motherfucker chicken criminal! Get off my phone, you sonofabitch! You call me again, you’ll be in jail rot! You bastard! You piece of shit! Shit! Shit!
Hey, it’s Jethro. How ya doin’? [exhales]
Hey, I just wanted to let you know, we got Tyler; he’s gonna play drums with us. I just wanted you to say hi to Tyler right here.

You’re a motherfuckin’ chickenshit criminal and if you don’t stop—I know, already, where you live and I have a soldier in my house. He came from the—from the Army. And he’s gonna shred you to pieces, I swear to God! You do this one more, you sonofabitch and you’ll be shredded to pieces!—
Why don’t you just take it easy?—
—You sonofabitch! You’re a motherfuckin’ chickenshit criminal!
You do this one more time and we’ll come to your house and we’ll shred you up to pieces!—
Who are you and what is your name and why are you calling me?
Excuse me, who the hell is this?

I think you’re a criminal! You’re a motherfucker chickenshit criminal! Otherwise you would say who you are! Anybody that calls me tells me who he is! Without your name, you know what’s goin’ on all day—you’re a motherfuckin’ criminal! And I’m gonna report you—
—I’m gonna report you to the police—
—This number—Who the—who the hell—who the hell is this?
Who do you wanna talk to?
I was just speaking with someone named Ishmael. Who is this?
Who do you wanna talk to?
—What’s the name you wanna talk to, you—
—you chickenshit?! Why do you wanna talk to?! You criminal! You’re nothing but a criminal! You’re gonna be arrested tonight, you motherfucker!
What can I do for ya?
Why are you calling me. Did you have my mail? Why are you calling me?
I—my phone rang. I didn’t call you! [unclear, perhaps, "I just talked to"]—
—Hey, well then, you’re a buncha criminals and I’m calling the police right now! You’re ruining America! You motherfuckin’ chickenshit criminals! Bastards! Drop dead, you sonofabitch!
[“Woman(2)” laughs in background and speaks as:]
